---
title: "Awards"
listing:
    - id: awards
      contents:
        - awards/*.yml
      type: table
      fields: [date, subtitle, title, description]
      field-display-names:
        title: "Award"
        date: "Date"
        subtitle: "Event"
        description: "Note"
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: false
      sort-ui: false
      filter-ui: false
# date-format: "MMM, YYYY"
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---
